title: tragia paraguariensis var. discolor
intro: Tragia paraguariensis var. discolor, also known as the bitter spinach or bitter amaranth, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The health benefits of this plant include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Tragia paraguariensis var. discolor include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
